title: Legacy Terrain
description: Brings the nostalgic terrain generation of old Minecraft into the modern game with Legacy, Alpha, Beta, Console, and Amplified-inspired world presets.
body:
![Legacy Terrain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8578f12851bbc182e505b4fde1de8f06492aaa1c.png)

# Legacy Terrain - Modern gameplay, nostalgic worlds!

**Legacy Terrain** brings the atmosphere of old Minecraft terrain generation into the modern game. Explore classic-style landscapes while keeping modern blocks, mobs, and gameplay features.

## ✨ Features
- **Five nostalgic world presets**:
  - **Legacy Terrain** - a balanced classic-style experience
  - **Legacy Alpha** - rough and unpredictable Alpha-inspired landscapes
  - **Legacy Beta** - smoother rolling hills, forests, beaches, and classic coastlines
  - **Legacy Console** - inspired by the terrain style of classic console editions
  - **Legacy Amplified** - dramatic elevated terrain with a nostalgic touch
- **Classic-style beaches and coastlines**
- **Familiar biome layouts** with forests, plains, hills, deserts, oceans, and snowy regions
- **Modern Minecraft blocks and mobs**
- **Modern gameplay features remain available**
- **Singleplayer and multiplayer support**
- **No configuration required**

## 🌍 World presets
- **Legacy Terrain**: recommended for a balanced nostalgic world
- **Legacy Alpha**: ideal for rougher old-school landscapes
- **Legacy Beta**: ideal for rolling hills and classic coastlines
- **Legacy Console**: inspired by the familiar feel of classic console worlds
- **Legacy Amplified**: ideal for larger and more dramatic landscapes

## 🔧 Requirements
- **Loaders**:
  - Fabric Loader 0.19.2+ and Fabric API
  - Quilt *(planned)*
  - Forge *(planned)*
  - NeoForge *(planned)*
- **Java**: 25+
- **Environment**: Client and server

## 📖 Usage
1. Install **Fabric Loader**, **Fabric API**, and **Legacy Terrain**.
2. Open the **Create New World** screen.
3. Select one of the Legacy Terrain world presets.
4. Create your world and start exploring.

> 💡 Create a new world after installing the mod. Existing chunks will not be regenerated automatically.
